comments: Approved. The contract scope is correctly bounded to generating the final synthesis document at tasks/v0.7-m6-c-comparative-synthesis.md and aligns with the recon packet's stated in-scope deliverable of drafting that report only. The contract also correctly preserves the intended analytical content: consolidating M6-A and M6-B evidence, comparing the V0.7 Unified Model against non-intrusive schema injection alternatives, and formalizing V0.8 carry-over epics as planning outputs rather than implementation work. The out_of_scope section is sufficiently strict and explicitly forbids all prohibited activity required by the review brief: implementation of V0.8 candidates, active .agent-state/ physical migrations, code changes under src/, and modifications to active workflow state semantics via workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json. allowed_files is properly restricted to the synthesis document, while auxiliary artifacts are limited to result/reporting files. stop_conditions reinforce enforcement by halting any attempt to write outside the allowed file set, implement roadmap targets, or proceed without approved contract status. No scope leak or implementation authorization was found.
